narrative:
Greenfield Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 265 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.1 percentage points.
